name: zrndr_set_perspective_adaptive_correction
description: zRndr::SetPerspectiveAdaptiveCorrection updates the span depth bias, bias-plus-one, and reciprocal guard values.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zRndr::SetPerspectiveAdaptiveCorrection: 20 unmasked mismatches after masking 28 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 72 bytes and the VC object body is 80 bytes with 8 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The reviewed byte drift is FPU branch/control-flow shape around the zero/NaN reciprocal guard; the native smoke verifies bias, plus-one, and reciprocal behavior for the zero divisor case.
